commands.help: Perform an OAuth code grant against Azure and print the returned tokens
commands.long_help: Performs an OAuth authorization code flow with PKCE against Azure AD. Opens a browser on the target to authenticate, listens on localhost for the redirect callback, then exchanges the authorization code for tokens. The specified client_id must already have consent in the tenant and accept http://localhost as a redirect URI. If hint is omitted and multiple saved logins exist, authentication will fail.

arguments.name: client-id
arguments.desc: Azure app client ID (must have consent and http://localhost redirect URI)

arguments.name: scope
arguments.desc: OAuth scope string for the client ID

arguments.name: hint
arguments.desc: Login hint email address. Omit if only one saved login exists

arguments.name: browser-path
arguments.desc: Full path to browser executable (only used when browser=3/Other, max 260 chars)
